title: Myst Worlds
description: Myst worlds lets you create your own worlds in Minecraft following the lore of the Myst series.
body:
## Description
Myst Worlds adds books that can take you to new worlds called Ages. When writing the books using symbolic runes the book may become unstable and create weird worlds while stable books will look just as you described them.

Myst Worlds also adds 2 new crafting stations for writing and carving runes, inks that can determine the biome colors and a memory stone that can be used to customize the cover image of the book by taking a screenshot.
